title: habenella latilabris
intro: Habenella latilabris is a type of flowering plant, also known as the "hairy leaf" or "hairy-leaved Habenella," that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Habenella latilabris include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Habenella latilabris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
